## Origin

- Source: <the review/audit report (path or issue #N) that surfaced this>
- Finding: <the FINDING title, verbatim> — severity: <blocker|major|minor|nit>
- Discovered during: <the issue/story being worked when it surfaced, #N>

<Link this issue back: comment on the origin issue so the trail runs both ways.>

## User story

As a <role>, I want <the defect fixed / the gap closed> so that <benefit>.

## Acceptance criteria (EARS)

Write each criterion in one of the EARS patterns so it is gradeable:

- When <trigger>, the system shall <response>.
- If <unwanted condition>, then the system shall <response>.

## Scope

<In scope / explicitly out of scope — keep it the finding, not a rewrite.>
